inputs.text: FIELD-ALIGNED — High-end generative design language: immersive systems, responsive environments; reinterpret form, texture, light, depth — not literal copy. Controlled abstraction, hierarchy, minimal staging, modular system feel. STRUCTURAL branch: computational morphology, continuous silhouette logic, spatial rhythm, mass and void, disciplined curvature, one dominant sculptural event, gallery staging, parametric flow, calm reduced palette, cool neutral and cobalt accents. Razor contours, readable shadows, museum composition. Non-representational. No isometric toy diagram, no literal cabin.

MATERIAL LAB STUDY — visceral tactile macro: anisotropic brushed metal, thick translucent resin with subsurface scattering, iridescent pearlescent ceramic, porous or crystalline microtexture, stacked ridges and tactile rhythm, contact micro-shadows, specular breakup and edge wear, high-frequency surface detail, cyan lime magenta accent glints, path-traced Octane-class lighting, strong micro-contrast, sensory CMF exploration board, non-representational, no soft jelly blob only, no seat screen dashboard

FIELD-ALIGNED — Same design-system principles. ATMOSPHERIC branch: luminous spatial field, soft volumetric light, ambient gradients, exhibition-like emptiness, cinematic stillness, subtle depth layering, glass refraction and subtle caustics, teal cobalt over warm neutrals, HDR. Iridescent filaments, refractive curves, diagonal composition, negative space, one focal zone. Non-representational. No flat diffuse snapshot, no mushy blur-only dreamscape, no fantasy scenery.
